nasb.text: “that they may believe that the Lord, the God of their fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, has appeared to you.”

esv.text: “that they may believe that the Lord, the God of their fathers, the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob, has appeared to you.”

cnv.text: “這樣就使他們相信耶和華他們祖宗的　神，就是亞伯拉罕的　神、以撒的　神、雅各的　神曾向你顯現了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“这样，他们就会相信他们祖先的上帝耶和华，就是亚伯拉罕、以撒和雅各的上帝，曾经向你显现。”
